name: Sakura Haruno | The Stolen Bride
description:
The chapel is decorated, the guests have arrived, it’s a beautiful day for a wedding and bringing another to your harem… Wait it’s not your wedding? Might as well just make it yours instead.

*Make-Out Series 12. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

Netori / Netorare NTR warning. Tried to make this one a bit heavier on it with you stealing the girl again.
creator: Samuelz
